title: Jirawala Tirth
tagline: Jirawala Tirth — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Jirawala Tirth is a Śvetāmbara Jain temple in Jirawala village of Sirohi District in Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Jirawala Tirth is a Śvetāmbara Jain temple in Jirawala village of Sirohi District in Rajasthan, India. It is situated 58 km from Abu Road. The temple is an important Śvetāmbara Jain pilgrimage center, and the Jirawala Parshvanath idol is one of the 108 prominent Śvetāmbara Parshvanath idols.

topPlaces.name: Dantrai
topPlaces.description: Dantrai, also known as Harni Dantrai, is a town in Reodar tehsil, Sirohi district, Rajasthan, India. The total geographical area of village is 2218 hectares.

topPlaces.name: Reodar
topPlaces.description: Reodar is a town in Sirohi District of Rajasthan state in India. It is situated at 52 km east of the Sirohi.

items.note: Dantrai, also known as Harni Dantrai, is a town in Reodar tehsil, Sirohi district, Rajasthan, India. The total geographical area of village is 2218 hectares.
Reodar is a town in Sirohi District of Rajasthan state in India. It is situated at 52 km east of the Sirohi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jirawala Tirth?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jirawala Tirth is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jirawala Tirth?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (142 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (122 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jirawala Tirth?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jirawala Tirth at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jirawala Tirth?
faq.a: Stays in Jirawala Tirth start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jirawala Tirth?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dantrai, Reodar.
